MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_END_DT 
LABEL: 
Managed Care Plan Contract End Date 
DESCRIPTION: The expiration date of the managed care contract period with the state. 
SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_END_DT 
LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_END_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE

8 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE:

VALUES:

31DEC9999 = (default value) no
